required_test_categories.description: Test cases that must be covered for each template

categories.name: boundary
categories.description: Test boundary values for constrained ports
categories.coverage: For each port with constraints (min, max, length, pattern)
examples: Integer port with min=5, max=10: test 5, 10, 4, 11
String port with pattern: test valid and invalid patterns
List port with min_length: test empty list, min_length list

categories.name: null_input
categories.description: Test null values for required ports
categories.expected_behavior: Should fail validation with clear error message

categories.name: type_error
categories.description: Test wrong shape values for each port
categories.coverage: For each port, test values of different primitive shapes
examples: String port: test integer, boolean, list inputs
Integer port: test string, float, dict inputs
categories.expected_behavior: Should fail validation or coerce if unsafe

categories.name: missing_port
categories.coverage: Omit each required port one at a time
categories.expected_behavior: Should fail validation with clear error message

property_assertions.description: Property-based tests inferred from port schemas

inference_rules.condition: Pure function with no side effects

inference_rules.test: f(f(a, b), c) == f(a, f(b, c))

fixed_cases.description: Manually defined test cases in tests.json

format.name: Test case identifier
format.inputs: Dictionary mapping port names to test values
format.expected_outputs: Dictionary mapping output port names to expected values
format.expected_error: Optional error message for failure cases

generated_cases.naming: Generated test names include strategy and port name

port_coverage.description: Each port must be tested in multiple scenarios
requirements: At least one valid input per port
At least one invalid input per port (type_error)

code_coverage.description: Implementation code must be covered by tests
code_coverage.branches: All conditional branches must be exercised

assertions: Use assert for output value comparisons
